chemo.name: Daunorubicin or Idarubicin
notes: Give anthracycline AFTER the daily Cytarabine infusion completes
Monitor cardiac function; check baseline LVEF
Use central line (PICC/CVC) — avoid peripheral administration

chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Start Prednisolone eye drops 2 hours before first dose

chemo.name: Filgrastim (G-CSF)
notes: Continue until ANC ≥ 1000 for two consecutive days

nursingNotes: Strict continuous infusion monitoring during Cytarabine
High risk of TLS — ensure hydration and allopurinol if needed
Monitor for cytarabine syndrome: fever, chest pain, rash
